_comment: PROJECT-LOCAL engine config — this APP's applied engine-migration FILE PATHS, per engine key. `os-inherit engine-check` reads this for the DDL-parity inputs so the drift gate is MULTI-TENANT. The demo-app applies the CANONICAL engine migration set VERBATIM (byte-identical) into its own sequence — the strongest form of structural equivalence. This is exactly the per-app declaration shape PLOS will write on install (with its own renumbered/split paths).
